items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking a Senior Security Engineer to strengthen our security posture across the entire organization. You will be responsible for identifying vulnerabilities, building security tooling, and embedding security practices into our development lifecycle.

In this role you will work across teams to ensure that security is not an afterthought but a core part of how we build and ship software. You will report to the Head of Security and have significant autonomy in shaping our security roadmap.

Responsibilities

  • Conduct application security assessments, penetration testing, and threat modeling
  • Build and maintain automated security scanning in CI/CD pipelines
  • Develop and enforce security policies, standards, and incident response procedures
  • Monitor for security threats using SIEM tools and respond to incidents promptly
  • Lead security awareness training and champion a security-first culture
  • Evaluate and manage third-party security tools and vendor relationships

Requirements

  • 6+ years of experience in application or infrastructure security
  • Deep understanding of OWASP Top 10, common attack vectors, and remediation strategies
  • Experience with security tools such as Burp Suite, Snyk, SonarQube, or equivalent
  • Strong knowledge of cloud security (AWS or GCP) and container security
  • Familiarity with compliance frameworks (SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR)

Nice to Have

  • Relevant certifications (CISSP, OSCP, CEH)
  • Experience with bug bounty programs
  • Background in software engineering
